summary: SLIVE playback starts at live point
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
steps.result:
THEN initPlaybackSession is called via a graphql network call
AND the video player goes full screen
AND playback starts at the live point
AND the playhead displays far right on the scrubber bar
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
